accuracy.reasoning: The agent's answer explicitly lists VER (with DVER/NDVER), ESR, MSR, and a conventional dispatchable generation category labeled “Standard” Generation Resource, which maps to Dispatchable Resource. sources.reasoning: The agent cites authoritative primary sources (SPP Glossary and SPP Markets+ Protocols) which are appropriate and relevant for claims about valid resource/participation types in SPP. These sources directly cover terminology such as DRR/DDR/BDR, VER/DVER/NDVER, ESR/HSMR and other Markets+ participation types, so the authority and relevance are high. Minor issues prevent a top score: the agent conflates some labels (e.g., using both MSR and ESR without clarifying namespace differences), and the Markets+ PDF reference date/filename appears to contain a typographical date which should be verified. Also, the answer could more explicitly distinguish exact registration dropdown values per registration system (RMS vs Markets+) and provide exact section/page citations from the protocols for full verifiability. Overall the cited sources are appropriate and credible but the presentation omits a couple of precision details and exact citation pointers.

attribute_details.name: Dispatchable Resource
attribute_details.expected: Fully dispatchable generation/injection asset (can be centrally dispatched by SPP)
attribute_details.agent_value: “Standard” Generation Resource (conventional dispatchable generation; default/non-VER, non-DR, non-storage case)

attribute_details.name: Dispatchable Variable Energy Resource (DVER)
attribute_details.expected: Variable generator that can be controlled/curtailed by SPP dispatch (variable but dispatchable)
attribute_details.agent_value: Dispatchable VER (DVER) listed as a VER sub-type

attribute_details.name: Electric Storage Resource (ESR)
attribute_details.expected: Energy storage asset (battery, pumped hydro, etc.) registered as storage
attribute_details.agent_value: Electric Storage Resource (ESR) referenced under Markets+ participation types

attribute_details.name: Market Storage Resource (MSR)
attribute_details.expected: Storage variant with specific market/modeling rules distinct from ESR
attribute_details.agent_value: Market Storage Resource (MSR) explicitly listed under storage resources

attribute_details.name: Variable Energy Resource (VER)
attribute_details.expected: Variable generation that is not centrally dispatchable (e.g., wind/solar without dispatch control)
attribute_details.agent_value: Variable Energy Resource (VER) with sub-types Dispatchable VER (DVER) and Non‑Dispatchable VER (NDVER)
